coach_notes: For the Asset Protection roles listed, first aid and CPR are critical gaps because these positions often require immediate response to incidents like medical emergencies or injuries in the store. Risk assessment and risk management are also essential for identifying and mitigating theft and safety hazards, which are core responsibilities in these jobs. Prioritize obtaining first aid/CPR certification and learning basic risk assessment techniques to align with job requirements.

jobs.title: Asset Protection Coordinator
jobs.label: ready
jobs.why: Your skills in security operations, security procedures, compliance, store security, and emergency response align directly with asset protection. Experience in sales floor and back-of-house operations is relevant to retail environment.
jobs.gaps: No specific gaps identified; ensure you highlight any inventory control or loss prevention experience in your resume.

jobs.title: Asset Protection Specialist (Part Time), Henderson (Sunset)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Security presence, security procedures, and compliance skills are directly applicable. Part-time flexibility matches your availability.
jobs.gaps: May need industry-specific knowledge for cannabis retail regulations; no mention of inventory tracking or CCTV monitoring in your resume.

jobs.title: Asset Protection Specialist (Part Time)
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Similar to Job 2, your security and compliance skills are strong. Part-time role fits your schedule.
jobs.gaps: Same as Job 2: potential need for cannabis industry knowledge and specific loss prevention tools.

jobs.title: Risk Associate - Walnut Street
jobs.label: target
jobs.why: Risk associate role leverages your compliance and security procedures background. Communication skills are important for this role.
jobs.gaps: May require more analytical or risk assessment experience; no direct risk management or data analysis skills listed.

jobs.title: Detention Deputy Pre-Certified
jobs.label: reach
jobs.why: Emergency response and security presence are relevant to detention deputy duties. Basic computer skills are a plus.
jobs.gaps: Major gaps: no law enforcement or corrections training, no mention of physical fitness standards, legal knowledge, or weapon handling. Pre-certification requirement suggests need for specific training not in your resume.
